title: S85F 83 Inch Oled 4K Smart Tv Qa83S85Faesmm
features: Feel the full power of AI in 4K

This processor uses the power of 20 AI neural networks to optimize picture and sound quality. The result is superb performance, whether you're streaming OTT services, playing your favorite video games or watching live sports.
Boost shows and movies to 4K resolution

Watch your favorite content in more brilliant detail. Our AI processor can take content and enhance it up to 4K resolution with 20 AI neural networks — all while maintaining sharp and smooth picture quality.
Our processor analyzes each scene and boosts for brightness. The result is a beautifully bright screen with improved contrast, which brings hidden details to light.4
Enjoy a full range of authentic colors

As a trusted symbol of color fidelity by industry experts, ‘PANTONE Validated' certifies the accurate expression of 2,140 PANTONE colors and 110 newly-added skin tone shades. So you can be sure that you're getting a rich, true-to-life viewing experience.5
Get smooth motion for games up to 120Hz
Experience your favorite games without lag or blur. Samsung’s unique dynamic refresh technology provides smooth motion performance for VRR games up to 4K 120Hz.

One UI Tizen provides a personalized screen experience. With Samsung Tizen OS, it delivers all the latest innovative Samsung features. Your experience is also secured by Samsung Knox across SmartThings devices. Plus, One UI Tizen will support Tizen OS upgrades for the next 7 years.
Enjoy 7 years ofnew TV experiencesfor free

With a solar panel on its back, our SolarCell Remote is charged by light — no need for disposable batteries. And with smart features like a built-in microphone and voice assistant, this remote is innovative in more ways than one.19

specifications.Multi Device Experience: TV to Mobile, Mobile to TV, TV initiate mirroring, Sound Mirroring, Wireless TV On, Tap View
